description: Jooble is a job search and aggregation platform that lists vacancies from employers and partner sources. It also offers partner integrations for distributing or retrieving job listings, including a REST API for search results and ATS/XML feed onboarding pages.
summary: Jooble exposes one documented developer integration surface: a REST API at `https://jooble.org/api/{api_Key}` authenticated by a Jooble-issued API key embedded in the request path; no public GraphQL, MCP server, or CLI surfaced in the docs found.
